title: Enhanced Sounds Resource Pack For PM Weather Mod
description: This resource pack replaces various sounds with better ones to complement ProtoManly's Weather Mod.
body:
This resource pack replaces and adds new various sounds to complement ProtoManly's Weather Mod. Simply drop it into your resource packs folder and enjoy a richer, more vibrant soundscape.

Since it is impossible to upload a video here, check it here on YOuTube so you can them, copy this link https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kOVW2uvAFJA
